thinking.text: The OCR on the HQ frames is returning just '>' with no command text. The 1fps frames (frames3) seem to have better OCR results. Let me check the frames3 versions for these early frames to see the commands.

tool_calls.Name: execute_shell
tool_calls.Arguments:
{"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
import os
import subprocess

frames_dir = "/tmp/frames3"

for i in range(8, 20):
    f = f"frame_{i:04d}.png"
    frame_path = os.path.join(frames_dir, f)
    if not os.path.exists(frame_path):
        continue
    result = subprocess.run(["tesseract", frame_path, "stdout"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    text = result.stdout
    lines = text.split('\n')
    print(f"\n=== {f} ===")
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip().startswith('>'):
            print(f"  {line.strip()}")
EOF
", "duration": 10.0}
